status.restart_required: Configuration changed. Restart Voice Link for the new settings to take effect.
status.command_required: Add at least one macro command before enabling Voice Link.

bindings.title: HARDWARE KEY BINDINGS
bindings.subtitle: Map logical commands to physical keyboard inputs

settings.title: GLOBAL CONFIGURATION
settings.subtitle: Tweak voice recognition and presser engine behaviors
settings.mode_hint: Only one runtime mode is active at a time. AI mode reuses the existing Push-to-Talk binding.
settings.ai_tts_enabled_desc: Automatically synthesize and play the assistant reply using the current turn recording as the reference voice.
settings.ai_reference_audio_select_hint: You can pick from local AI recordings here. If empty, the current turn recording is used.
settings.ai_reference_audio_path_placeholder: Or enter an absolute local audio path directly
settings.ai_reference_text_placeholder: Enter the transcript for the reference audio. If empty, the current turn transcript is used.
settings.ai_auto_execute_desc: When enabled, AI tool calls will execute locally without an extra confirmation step.
settings.ai_ptt_hint: AI mode reuses the existing Push-to-Talk binding from Key Bindings.
settings.mic_test_disabled: Microphone testing is disabled while Voice Link is active
settings.speaker: Speaker
settings.monitor_local_playback_desc: When disabled, macro audio stops playing through your default speakers and is only injected into the virtual audio device.
settings.virtual_mic_desc: Controls whether your live microphone is mixed into the virtual audio device. When disabled, macro audio still injects into the virtual device, but your real microphone does not.
settings.virtual_mic_device_invalid: This virtual output device is not usable for mixing:
settings.virtual_mic_device_hint: On Windows this is usually the playback side of the virtual cable, such as VB-CABLE's "CABLE Input". Then choose the matching recording side inside your chat app.
settings.virtual_mic_locked: Stop Voice Link before changing virtual mic settings.
settings.virtual_mic_input_volume: Live Mic Volume In Virtual Mic ({{val}}x)
settings.speaker_wait_end: Wait for current audio to finish
settings.speaker_wait_end_desc: When enabled, the next response clip waits until the current audio finishes playing.
settings.model_required: Download the selected Vosk model before enabling Voice Link.
settings.enable_denoise_desc: Denoise the microphone input before meter testing, speech recognition, and virtual mic mixing.
settings.enable_occ_desc: Automatically execute the recognized Console Arrow sequence using macro engine.

ai.title: AI OPERATIONS
ai.subtitle: Voice-first agent mode with local tools and tactical session memory
ai.empty_sessions: No AI sessions yet. Start a new session to create the first local record.
ai.empty_conversation_body: Press and hold the shared Push-to-Talk key to record the first voice turn once the audio pipeline is wired in.
ai.select_or_create: Select an existing session or create a new one from the left panel.
ai.mode_locked_body: Switch the global mode to AI Agent to enable the AI workspace, session storage, and tool-capable runtime.
ai.mode_active_hint: Voice Link stays offline while the AI agent workspace is enabled.
ai.ptt_body: This mode reuses the existing global Push-to-Talk binding. Recording and transcription will attach here in the next implementation slice.

errors.sync_runtime: Failed to sync the AI runtime.

agent.title: Agent
agent.name: Agent Name
agent.enable_thinking_hint: Reserve this for models or prompts that benefit from a slower, more reflective response path.
agent.new_prompt: You are a helpful AI operator for Hellcall. Use tools when they are available and useful.

skills.title: Skills
skills.auto_execute_hint: When enabled, tool calls execute immediately on this machine.

models.title: Models
models.tts_enabled_hint: Automatically synthesize and play the final assistant reply with a fixed system voice.

stratagems.title: Stratagems
stratagems.subtitle: Cache and display the full Helldivers stratagem catalog from the wiki
stratagems.empty_hint: Use the Update button to fetch the wiki page and store it in the local TOML cache.

updater.title: New Version Available: {{version}}
updater.description: A new release is ready to download and install.
